# <Product / Feature Name> — Product Requirements Document (PRD)

## Document control
| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Version | <e.g. 1.0> |
| Status | <Draft — not approved / Ready for sign-off / Approved> |
| Owner (PO) | <name> |
| Author | <BA / PO> |
| Approvers | <names / roles> |
| Last updated | <date> |
| Quality stamp | Clarify score <NN>/100 — band: <band> OR not run |

| Version | Date | Summary of changes | Driver |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1.0 | <date> | Initial finalized document | <answer sheet v1 / —> |
<!-- finalize never overwrites silently: the previous file is archived as
     final-prd.v<N>.md, Version bumps, and a row is added here citing the driver
     (answer sheet vN / CR-nn). -->

> Assembled by Clarify from confirmed outputs. Items marked `ASSUMPTION` /
> `OPEN QUESTION` are unresolved. Status is never `Approved` while a blocker-level
> finding exists.

## 7. User stories & acceptance criteria
<Summarized from stories.md when build-ready layer exists. If not, state:
"Stories and acceptance criteria were not generated; run `/clarify:from-spec`
only if Dev/QA build-ready handoff is needed.">

## 8. Functional Flows (process-centric)
Organized **by business process** (use case), not by diagram type. Each flow keeps
step-by-step + activity + sequence together for the SAME process. Composed from
`model-suggestions.md`; do not invent steps/rules/errors.

### 8.1 Customer/User Journey Overview
<High-level end-to-end journey only; detail lives in the per-flow blocks. Mark
missing steps `OPEN QUESTION`.>

### 8.2 Flow Catalog
| Flow ID | Business name | Actor(s) | Goal | Diagrams | Related rules (BR) | Related error codes | Requirement (Rxx) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| F01 | <…> | <…> | <…> | activity + sequence | <…> | <…> | <R1> |

### 8.3 Flow F01 — <Business name>
**8.3.1 Step-by-step**
| # | Actor | Action | System response | Rule / validation / error code |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | <…> | <…> | <…> | <…> |

**8.3.2 Activity diagram (PlantUML)**
```plantuml
<from model-suggestions.md — THIS flow>
```
**View / edit:** https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml — ref: https://plantuml.com/

**8.3.3 Sequence diagram (Mermaid)** — same flow
```mermaid
<from model-suggestions.md — THIS flow>
```
**View / edit:** https://mermaid.live/
<!-- Simple/single-system flow: replace with "Sequence diagram not required — <reason>". -->

**8.3.4 Gaps revealed / Open questions**
- <gap or `OPEN QUESTION` from this flow>

### 8.4 Flow F02 — <Business name>
<repeat; activity + sequence in one block must be the SAME process — never mix>

### 8.5 Screen / Display Matrix
Placed **after** the flows. Map each screen back to the flow/step it serves.
| Screen | Flow / Step | Purpose | Display fields | User actions | Validation | Error / empty / loading states | UX / content notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

### 8.6 Screen Wireframes (low-fidelity HTML)
Render an inline HTML visualization widget here when the target Markdown renderer
supports it; otherwise write `clarify-output/wireframes.html` and link it here.
Use `templates/wireframe-template.html`. The widget is grayscale, derive-only, and
maps every screen back to its source flow/step and requirement. Do not use ASCII
wireframes as the primary screen artifact.

## 9. Data & API impact
<From api-data-impact.md when build-ready layer exists; otherwise summarize
business/product-level affected systems from the draft and mark detailed API/data
impact as optional for Dev/QA handoff.>

## 10. Edge cases, exception handling & messages
<Summary from edge-case-matrix.md.>

### 10.1 Error Handling & Message Mapping
Each error maps back to the flow/step it occurs in (from §8).
| Error code | Flow / Step | Scenario | HTTP / API status | Entity state | Transaction / operation state | User-facing message | Retryable? | Required action | Needs Ops/CS? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

### 10.2 State summary
| Model type | State set | Trigger / event | Owner system | Terminal states | Gaps |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Entity state | <from model-suggestions.md> | <who/what moves it> | <source of truth> | <…> | <…> |
| Transaction / operation state | <from model-suggestions.md> | <…> | <…> | <…> | <…> |

| Req id | Flow (Fxx) | Business rule | Error / state | Story id | AC | Test id |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

## 14. Suggested additional capabilities (for confirmation)
Proactive recommendations to complete the product — **not** agreed scope until
confirmed.
- SUGGESTION: <capability> — rationale: <why>.

## 15. Sign-off blockers (must resolve before approval)
- OPEN QUESTION: <…>
- Blocker findings (from audit-report.md): <…>

## 16. Sign-off
| Approver | Role | Decision | Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

## Appendix: Generated artifacts
Companion files produced by Clarify in `clarify-output/` (list only those that
exist; diagrams are **source code** rendered via the linked viewers — Clarify does
not produce image files).
| Artifact | Description | Path |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Draft | Shaped PRD draft | `clarify-output/prd-draft.md` |
| Audit report | Score, band, findings | `clarify-output/audit-report.md` |
| Edge-case matrix | Edge / negative / boundary / temporal / batch | `clarify-output/edge-case-matrix.md` |
| Error handling | Error → state → user-message → action map | `clarify-output/error-handling.md` |
| Model suggestions | Per-flow activity (PlantUML) + sequence (Mermaid) + state | `clarify-output/model-suggestions.md` |
| Wireframes | Low-fi HTML screen wireframes | `clarify-output/wireframes.html` |
| API/data impact | Entities, source of truth, endpoints | `clarify-output/api-data-impact.md` |
| Stories + AC | User stories and acceptance criteria | `clarify-output/stories.md` |
| Test scenarios | Test cases | `clarify-output/test-scenarios.md` |
| Traceability | Requirement ↔ flow ↔ rule ↔ error ↔ story ↔ test | `clarify-output/traceability-matrix.md` |
